title: HR Chatbot
description: Development of a chatbot designed to assist with HR-related queries and tasks.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: HR Chatbot (DEM-2026-0081)

Executive Summary  
This project aims to develop an HR chatbot to streamline responses to employee queries and improve task efficiency within Human Resources. The chatbot will provide 24/7 support, enhancing the overall employee experience.

Business Value  
The chatbot will reduce HR workload by automating routine inquiries, enabling faster resolution times and allowing HR staff to focus on strategic initiatives. This improvement will contribute to greater employee satisfaction and operational productivity.

Risk Mitigation  
To address medium risk concerns, thorough testing and phased implementation will be conducted to ensure system reliability and user acceptance. Regular feedback loops will be established to promptly resolve any issues post-deployment.

Global resource utilization: 480/520 total weekly effort units currently allocated.
